title: Respite: There's Ash in My Coffee!!
description: A datapack that makes Respite's coffee more common
body:
This is a datapack meant to make Wild Coffee Bushes from Farmer's Respite more common when other mods are present, by increasing the generation and decreasing the generation of Ash from Supplementaries'. The datapack also increases the spawn weights for Wild Tea Bushes as well

Currently, this datapack also fixes two critical bugs with Farmer's Respite: the Kettle not dropping on servers and Coffee not spawning at all in the current version.

If you are unsure how to install the datapack, click [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Installing_a_data_pack) to visit the Minecraft Wiki page on that exact subject.

Report any issues to the Chef's Delight Discord server, and enjoy your caffeination!

Honorable mention to [DraconicArcher](https://modrinth.com/user/DraconicArcher) for helping with the mod package and the project in general
